disclaimer: This registry describes implemented software boundaries. It does not establish live provider health, complete court or date coverage, official reproduction, current law, or comprehensive judicial treatment.

providers.name: A2AJ Canadian legal data
providers.authority: Third-party aggregation; not an official reproduction
providers.knownLimits: Coverage is the dataset list reported by A2AJ at runtime. All reproductions are unofficial and require official-source checking. Court, date, language, text, and treatment coverage may be incomplete. No comprehensive noting-up claim.

providers.name: Ontario e-Laws
providers.authority: Official display source; ROSS extraction is an unofficial reproduction
providers.knownLimits: Current-source retrieval and currency metadata are implemented. Historical-version retrieval is not enabled until an official stable interface is validated.

providers.name: Justice Laws Canada
providers.authority: Official stable links; ROSS extraction is an unofficial reproduction
providers.knownLimits: Current XML and currency metadata are implemented. A historical answer requires an explicit archived version and cannot be inferred from the current repository.

providers.name: CourtListener
providers.authority: Third-party aggregation; not an official reproduction
providers.integrationStatus: Inherited and preserved as an optional U.S. provider
providers.knownLimits: Not an Ontario or Canadian authority source. Coverage, opinion text, and citation verification depend on CourtListener and configured credentials.

providers.name: CanLII bring-your-own-key metadata connector boundary
providers.authority: Each user must obtain their own CanLII API key and comply with the access granted to them
providers.integrationStatus: Per-user encrypted key storage is implemented; metadata transport remains disabled until the governed connector is activated
providers.knownLimits: ROSS does not scrape CanLII and supplies no shared access. CanLII's documented API exposes collection metadata, not decision full text. The rest of ROSS remains usable without a CanLII key; unavailable coverage must be disclosed.
